compositional_truth_check.reconciliation_notes: The registry provided (P1-P4) does not match the visual evidence. The pots contain no visible foliage, only soil, debris, and a white cylindrical object (likely a sensor or container). No Pothos, String of Nickels, or Mexican Mint are present.

plant_audit.p3_black_pot: Contains white rabbit anchor, but no plant matter.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Dark, damp, and undisturbed throughout the sequence.
biome_observations.anomalies: Presence of a white cylindrical object (sensor/probe) in the yellow pot. White debris (possibly eggshell fragments or perlite) present in the black pot containing the rabbit anchor.
biome_observations.desk_surface: Clean, no organic debris or leaf drop observed.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_current: No growth or biological activity detected. The environment remains static. The 'Rested State' shows no recovery or emergence of plant life.

visual_health_inference.reasoning: The pots are devoid of any photosynthetic tissue. The absence of plant matter across all time-stamped images suggests either a complete failure of the specimens or that the pots were never populated as described in the registry.

anomalies: Unidentified white cylindrical object in P1.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a complete absence of the expected botanical specimens. The biome is currently a collection of empty, soil-filled containers. The white rabbit anchor is present in P3, but the Pothos is missing. There is no evidence of germination, decay, or recent plant presence. The environment appears to be a controlled, static setup with no active biological growth.
